(1) FT t^T^* ^ (^^T?te) f ^ , 2007 f l (2 ) ^ MchlVl-1 ^ <ik1<sI ^ "Sr^ 2. 1994 ^ f ™ 6 ^ ^ - 1 ^ ( 6 ) ^ ^STFTRHfdRsId W 3Tqf^ ._ WltsT, ^ 11 2006 " 3 ^ ■'^ f^ T rF n « lT 3 lk ^ f^ ^ R I# T -|, 1 1 1 ^ ^ ,2 0 0 7 t o ; ^ cT^, ^ ^ y^K^j •qr -^5^ "4 arq^ w ^ ^rfn#lcT ^ I*' .[ m U 1601/717 2 0 0 6 -^ ( sn f)] ■qR f^yxm : - i p f m 729( 3?), cnTh3 29 1994 WJ y^^ici ^ 459(3T), 8 1996, m ^ .f n 710(ar), -cTRhl 8 2000, ^ .^ .f ^ . 282(37), c n ^ II 1^, 2006, 452(31), WRt^ 31 2006,-m ^,ft 4 5 9 ( 3 ? ) ,- ^ 2 3FTW 2006; m - ^ , f ^ . 469(3T), m itW 9 3TTOf, 2006 3}tT 697(3T), <TRte 11 ^TW, 2006?ra^T?flf^t^'>TRI 2056 G.I/2007 MINISTRY OF INFORMATION AND BROADCASTING NOTinCATION New Delhi, the 11th April, 2007 G.S.R. 286(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (1) of Section 22 of the Cable Television Networks (Regulation) Act, 1995 (7 of 1995), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Cable Television Networks Rules, 1994, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called The Cable Television Network (Amendment) Rules, 2007. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Cable Television Networks Rules, 1994, in rule 6, in sub-rule (6), for the first proviso the following proviso shall be substituted, namely:— “Provided that a cable operator may continue to carry or include in his cable service any Television broadcast or channel, whose application for registration to the Central Govenmient w ^ made on or before the 11th May, 2006 and is under consideration, for a period of ttiree months from 11th February, 2007 or till such registration has been granted or refused, whichever is earU^.” [F.No.l601/71/2006-TV(I)] N. BAUENDRA KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Foot Note:—The principal rules w ^ published vide G.S.R. 729(E), dated the 29lli September, 1994 and amended vide G.S.R. 459(E), dated the 8th October, 1996, G.S.R, 710(E), dated the 8th Septeanber, 2000, G.SJi.282(E),datedthellth May, 2006, G.S.R. 452(E), dated the 3 Ut July, 2006, G.S.R. 459(E), dated the 2nd August, 2006, G.S.R. 469(E), dated the 9th August, 2006 and G.S.R. 697(E), dated the 11th Novemba; 2006.
